name: Nownodes
description: Retrieve Ethereum address, block, and transaction data from the NOWNodes BlockBook REST API.

auth.hint: Create a NOWNodes API key and send it in the api-key header.

tools.name: get_address
tools.description: Retrieve confirmed and unconfirmed balances and transaction identifiers for an Ethereum address.

tools.name: get_block
tools.description: Retrieve block metadata and included transactions by height or hash.

tools.name: get_transaction
tools.description: Retrieve a BlockBook v2 transaction representation by transaction identifier.

tools.name: get_balance_history
tools.description: Retrieve received, sent, and self-sent balance history grouped by time interval.

params.name: address
params.description: Ethereum address whose balance history should be returned.
